mechanism_narrative: Positive short-run momentum in retail sales signals improving household demand and revenue expectations; higher 3-month RSAFS growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest value 351418.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward coefficient on 3-month RSAFS growth is not positive, or if triggered positive RSAFS momentum episodes produce positive 20-day returns in no more than the unconditional hit rate.

mechanism_narrative: An elevated and rising unemployment rate signals weak labor income, rising default risk, and pressure on corporate margins; when UNRATE crosses high-stress levels, S&P 500 forward returns are negative over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 8.0% or rises more than 0.3pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE latest value 9.7 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day S&P 500 returns are positive in more than 60% of observations after UNRATE crosses above 8.0%, or if the signal coefficient is nonnegative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Near-zero policy rates combined with contained consumer-price pressure lower discount rates without forcing immediate tightening; FEDFUNDS below 0.5% with non-accelerating CPI predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS below 0.5% and 3-month CPIAUCSL growth not above its prior 12-month pace
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:FEDFUNDS latest value 0.16 as of t-1mo
fact:CPIAUCSL latest value 214.469 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-below-0.5% and non-accelerating-CPI condition does not deliver higher 60-day mean returns than other periods, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: Depressed housing starts signal weak residential investment and constrained household balance sheets; when HOUST remains below a cyclical stress threshold, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below 700 thousand units or stays below 700 for 2 consecutive monthly releases
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest value 581.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST-below-700 episodes have nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if the downside hit rate is below 50% in walk-forward out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates improving capacity utilization, inventory rebuilding, and cyclical earnings momentum; positive 3-month INDPRO growth predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO latest value 95.9709 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO growth crossings are followed by negative average 5-day S&P 500 returns, or if the out-of-sample directional accuracy is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate below 0.5% signals aggressive monetary accommodation that supports equity valuations through low cash yields and cheaper financing; this predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest value 0.16 as of t-1mo
regime_hint: monetary easing at the zero lower bound
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS-below-0.5% periods do not show higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than FEDFUNDS-above-0.5% periods, or if the estimated effect is negative in rolling validation.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth while unemployment remains elevated marks transition from recession contraction to recovery; PAYEMS improving with UNRATE above 8% predicts positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth crosses above 0 while UNRATE is above 8.0%
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:UNRATE
fact:PAYEMS latest value 131223.0 as of t-1mo
fact:UNRATE latest value 9.7 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if PAYEMS-positive-growth with UNRATE-above-8% produces lower 60-day returns than PAYEMS-positive-growth with lower unemployment, or if the interaction term is not positive.

mechanism_narrative: Weak real GDP growth signals broad demand shortfall and pressure on aggregate profits; when GDPC1 growth crosses below zero, S&P 500 forward returns are negative over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
fact:GDPC1 latest value 12892.5 as of t-5mo
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 negative-growth crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional average.
